sub_modules.bitrev_addr: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal address generator used to reorder input samples into bit-reversed order for DIT FFT.
sub_modules.stage_index_gen: Combinational generator that, given the current stage and butterfly counter, computes the butterfly pair indices p,q and the twiddle ROM index for that stage.
sub_modules.twiddle_rom: Combinational ROM providing Q1.15 cos/sin twiddle factor values for a given index; negates sin component for IFFT (conjugated) mode.
sub_modules.butterfly_unit: Combinational radix-2 DIT butterfly unit: multiplies the q-sample by the twiddle factor and computes sum/difference with the p-sample, producing updated p and q outputs.
